name: openrouter-ai
description: MCP server for OpenRouter.ai integration with access to diverse AI models, provider routing controls, and unified response format

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
openrouter_api_key.description: Your OpenRouter.ai API key from https://openrouter.ai/keys

default_model.title: Default Model
default_model.description: Default model to use if not specified in requests (e.g., openrouter/auto)

max_tokens.title: Maximum Tokens
max_tokens.description: Default maximum number of tokens to generate

provider_quantizations.title: Provider Quantizations
provider_quantizations.description: Comma-separated list of quantization levels (e.g., fp16,int8)

provider_ignore.title: Ignored Providers
provider_ignore.description: Comma-separated list of provider names to ignore (e.g., openai,anthropic)

provider_sort.title: Provider Sort Order
provider_sort.description: Default sort criteria for providers (price, throughput, or latency)

provider_order.title: Provider Priority Order
provider_order.description: Comma-separated list of preferred provider IDs in priority order

provider_require_parameters.title: Require Parameter Support
provider_require_parameters.description: Only use providers that support all specified request parameters

provider_data_collection.title: Data Collection Policy
provider_data_collection.description: Default data collection preference (allow or deny)

provider_allow_fallbacks.title: Allow Provider Fallbacks
provider_allow_fallbacks.description: Allow fallback to other providers if preferred ones fail
